name: Vanguarr
overview: Surfaces per-user Suggested Movies and Suggested Shows views from Vanguarr inside Jellyfin.
description: Connects Jellyfin to Vanguarr's suggestions API, resolves ranked suggestions to existing library items, and exposes them as native user-specific Jellyfin views for movies and shows without extra libraries or symlink trees.

versions.changelog:
- Replaces the old channel surface with native user-specific Jellyfin views for Suggested Movies and Suggested Shows.
- Uses real Jellyfin library items inside those views so opening details pages and playback stay native.
- Adds startup registration and repair logic for the native suggested views plus cleaner plugin configuration text.
